creator: rguyom@pobox.com
text:
One can't select any of the postfix 'plugins'.

How-To-Repeat: 
	# (on an x86 machine without $BATCH set)
	cd /usr/ports/mail/postfix ; make configure
	# select at least one 'plugin'
	# the script prints 'nothing selected' and continue
	# none of the selected plugins are actually compiled-in
